assertions.assertion: An authorization policy named 'admin' is defined using RequireRole("admin")
assertions.rationale: The code defines options.AddPolicy("admin", policy => policy.RequireRole("admin")).

assertions.assertion: app.MapGroup("/admin") is used to group the admin endpoints
assertions.rationale: The code uses var adminGroup = app.MapGroup("/admin").

assertions.assertion: .RequireAuthorization("admin") or equivalent is applied to the group
assertions.rationale: The code applies .RequireAuthorization("admin") to the MapGroup call.

assertions.assertion: The individual admin endpoints are registered on the group rather than on app directly
assertions.rationale: Endpoints are registered as adminGroup.MapGet("/users", ...) and adminGroup.MapPost("/users", ...) instead of on app.
